title: Corrigendum to G.S.R 1034 (E) dated the 2nd November, 2016
description: Corrigendum to G.S.R 1034 (E) dated the 2nd November, 2016

In the said notification, in rule 2, for the words “the following sub-rule”, the words “the following sub-rules” shall be substituted. 2. In the said notification, for the figure and words “3. The vehicles referred to in”, the brackets, figure and words “(4) The vehicles referred to in” shall be substituted. [No. RT-11028/02/2016-MVL] ABHAY DAMLE, Jt. Secy. Uploaded by Dte. of Printing at Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 2 of 2 --
